summary: Completed Iteration 9 testing of Service Account Management features. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests for Service Account Manager verified working including create account, list accounts, toggle active/disabled, issue token, list tokens, revoke token.
critical_code_review_comments: Service Account Manager card loads on Settings page with correct title and description
Create service account form works - username, password, label fields all functional
Service accounts list displays with username, label, created date, and Active/Disabled badge
Toggle button correctly disables/enables service account with toast confirmation
Token issuance works - shows full token in green banner with 'Copy this token now' warning
Token list shows token prefix (sat_6cVrTgSj********), expiry date, and status badge
Revoke button correctly revokes token and shows 'Revoked' badge
Protected endpoints correctly reject revoked service tokens (401)
Protected endpoints accept valid service tokens for /api/auth/me
JWT authentication still works alongside service account tokens
Basic auth regression tests all pass (register/login/me)
seed_data_creation: Created test users and service accounts for API and UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 service account management features all verified: (1) Backend endpoints: GET /api/auth/service-accounts lists user's service accounts, PATCH /api/auth/service-accounts/{id} updates active/label, GET /api/auth/service-accounts/{id}/tokens lists tokens, POST /api/auth/service-account/tokens/{token_id}/revoke revokes tokens. (2) Existing endpoints still work: POST /api/auth/service-account/create and POST /api/auth/service-account/token. (3) Protected endpoints correctly reject revoked tokens and accept valid service tokens. (4) Frontend ServiceAccountManager component on Settings page works - create/list/toggle/issue/revoke all functional with proper toast notifications. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9_service_accounts.py.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/auth/me with revoked service token - PASSED (returns 401)
GET /api/auth/me with JWT still works - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Service Account Manager card visible - PASSED
Create service account form - PASSED (username/password/label inputs)
Create service account submission - PASSED (toast: 'Service account created')
Service accounts list displays - PASSED (shows username, label, date, status)
Toggle active/disable button - PASSED (toast: 'Service account disabled/enabled')
Issue token form - PASSED (password input, expiry days)
Issue token button - PASSED (toast: 'Long-lived service token issued')
Issued token banner - PASSED (shows full token with 'Copy this token now' warning)
Token list displays - PASSED (shows prefix, expiry, status)
Revoke token button - PASSED (toast: 'Service token revoked')
